content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 8, 2006

Roxanne Eady Didham, CPA
1946 Linwood Street
San Diego, California 92110


Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-122


Dear Ms. Didham:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice of June 29, 2006. As we discussed in our telephone conversation on September 5, 2006, we have withdrawn your request for advice.

Should you need assistance in the future, you may contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,


Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

[signature]
By: Lawrence T. Woodlock
Senior Legal Counsel
Legal Division

LTW:rd

embedding.qa_text: This letter is from the Fair Political Practices Commission (FPPC) in Sacramento, California, dated September 8, 2006. It is addressed to Roxanne Eady Didham, CPA, at her San Diego address. The letter responds to her request for advice, which was received on June 29, 2006. As discussed in their telephone conversation on September 5, 2006, the FPPC has withdrawn its previous response to her request. The letter states that if Ms. Didham needs assistance in the future, she may contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660. Sincerely, Luisa Menchaca General Counsel By: Lawrence T. Woodlock Senior Legal Counsel Legal Division
